moments.title: The Open Championship Nears Its Climax
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four majors, is being played at Royal Birkdale Golf Club from July 16-19, with the final rounds happening this weekend.

angles.name: Golf Grand Finale
angles.copy: It's moving day at Royal Birkdale! The Open Championship is heading for a thrilling conclusion this weekend. Who's got the nerve to lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Drama
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are battling it out at Royal Birkdale. Every shot counts as the 154th Open Championship reaches its exciting final stages.

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Last Ever Event
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park for its final ever edition on Saturday 18th and Sunday 19th July, promising a big farewell with a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Nottingham's Farewell
angles.copy: This is it, Nottingham! Splendour Festival is having its final ever party this weekend at Wollaton Hall. Let's send it off in style!

angles.name: Last Chance to Splendour
angles.copy: Don't miss the last dance! Splendour Festival wraps up its incredible 18-year run this weekend. Who are you hoping to catch for one last time?

moments.title: Tomorrowland Belgium Kicks Off First Weekend
moments.blurb: The first weekend of the world-renowned electronic music festival, Tomorrowland Belgium, takes place from July 17-19 in Boom, Belgium, drawing hundreds of thousands of fans.

angles.name: Unite for Tomorrowland
angles.copy: The magic begins! Tomorrowland Belgium's first weekend is LIVE. Who's soaking up the incredible atmosphere in Boom?

angles.name: Dance Anthem Mecca
angles.copy: From Boom to your speakers! Tomorrowland's first weekend is bringing the biggest dance anthems. What's your favourite set so far?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Suffolk's Creative Hub
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready! Latitude Festival kicks off next week, bringing a fantastic mix of music, comedy, and arts to Suffolk.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Happy 20th anniversary, Latitude! The festival is back next week for another incredible weekend. Who's got their tickets ready?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Final
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island UK Season 13 is confirmed to air on Monday, July 27, on ITV2 and ITVX, concluding eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Who Will Win Love Island?
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! The Love Island UK final is just over a week away. Who do you think will be crowned the winners of Season 13?

angles.name: Love Island Finale Prep
angles.copy: It's almost time for the Love Island final! Get ready for the last dose of villa drama and romance on July 27th.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', turns 79 on July 20.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana! Still making guitars sing after all these years. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! His music is timeless. Let's celebrate with a classic!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, best known for her 1981 Grammy-winning hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the distinctive voice of Kim Carnes! Her legacy is pure gold. What's your top Kim Carnes tune?

angles.name: Classic Crooner
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary Kim Carnes, turning 81 on July 20th! Her music is simply unforgettable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and founding member Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Pearl Jam Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Stone Gossard, the riff master from Pearl Jam! What's your favourite Pearl Jam anthem?

angles.name: Grunge Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard's 60th today! A true grunge icon and a cornerstone of Pearl Jam's sound.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20.

angles.name: Punk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the legendary drummer from the Sex Pistols! Still a punk rock icon!

angles.name: Anarchy in the UK
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul Cook's 70th today! The man who helped define punk drumming with the Sex Pistols.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick MacNeil
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, keyboardist and a key member of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, turns 68 on July 20.

angles.name: Simple Minds Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to Simple Minds' keyboard wizard, Mick MacNeil! His sound defined an era. What's your favourite Simple Minds hit?

angles.name: Scottish Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 68th to Mick MacNeil of Simple Minds fame! A true Scottish music legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez, known for hits like 'Lose You to Love Me', turns 34 on July 22.

angles.name: Pop Queen's Day
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez! From Disney star to pop icon, she's done it all. What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: Star Power
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday today! An absolute force in music and entertainment.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, known for 'Hotel California' and his solo work, turns 79 on July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley! His voice is synonymous with some of the greatest songs ever made. What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Don Henley, turning 79 today! A true rock and roll icon.

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the ultimate funk pioneer, George Clinton! Get down to some Parliament-Funkadelic today!

angles.name: P-Funk Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a grooving 85th birthday to the one and only George Clinton! Forever changing the game with his P-Funk sound.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Keith Sweat
moments.blurb: R&B legend Keith Sweat, known for new jack swing hits like 'Twisted' and 'I Want Her', turns 65 on July 22.

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the smooth R&B voice of Keith Sweat! What's your favourite track from the New Jack Swing king?

angles.name: New Jack Swing King
angles.copy: Celebrating Keith Sweat's 65th today! Still making us swoon with his timeless R&B hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Rick Davies
moments.blurb: Rick Davies, co-founder, vocalist, and keyboardist of the progressive rock band Supertramp, turns 82 on July 22.

angles.name: Supertramp's Sound
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to Rick Davies of Supertramp! His distinctive voice and piano defined so many classic rock tunes. Which is your favourite?

angles.name: Prog Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Rick Davies' 82nd today! The man behind Supertramp's iconic sound.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Sir Mick Jagger! Still got those moves and that voice. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

angles.name: Timeless Performer
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legend, Mick Jagger, on his 83rd birthday! A true icon of rock and roll.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the powerful drummer for the legendary band Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26.

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor! The man who laid down the beat for so many iconic tracks. What's your favourite Queen song?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Roger Taylor! A true drumming legend and a vital part of Queen.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Darlene Love
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and work with Phil Spector, turns 85 on July 26.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Darlene Love! Her voice is pure magic. What's your favourite track she's featured on?

angles.name: Wall of Sound Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Darlene Love's 85th today! A true icon with an unforgettable voice.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Gary Cherone
moments.blurb: Gary Cherone, best known as the lead vocalist for Extreme and briefly Van Halen, turns 65 on July 26.

angles.name: Extreme Vocalist
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Gary Cherone, the powerhouse vocalist of Extreme! What's your favourite song featuring his incredible range?

angles.name: Rock's Dynamic Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Gary Cherone's 65th today! From 'More Than Words' to his time with Van Halen, a truly dynamic singer.

moments.title: UK Summer Holiday Vibes
moments.blurb: With schools breaking up and the summer firmly underway across the UK, many families are enjoying their summer holidays.

angles.name: Summer Adventures
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Whether you're staying local or heading off on an adventure, we hope you're making the most of the UK summer holidays.

angles.name: Sunshine & Fun
angles.copy: Long days and hopefully sunshine! The UK summer holidays are in full swing. What's on your agenda for the next few weeks?
